title: 2011 Cricket World Cup
answer: India won the 2011 Men's Cricket World Cup by beating Sri Lanka in the final at Wankhede Stadium, Mumbai.

title: 2015 Cricket World Cup
answer: Australia won the 2015 Men's Cricket World Cup by beating New Zealand in the final at Melbourne.

title: 2019 Cricket World Cup
answer: England won the 2019 Men's Cricket World Cup after a tied final and tied Super Over against New Zealand at Lord's.

title: 2023 Cricket World Cup
answer: Australia won the 2023 Men's Cricket World Cup by beating India in the final at Ahmedabad.

title: 2007 T20 World Cup
answer: India won the inaugural 2007 ICC Men's T20 World Cup by beating Pakistan in the final at Johannesburg.
